title: Hiranandani Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hiranandani Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hiranandani Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hiranandani Group:
Hiranandani Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hiranandani Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
